pub load_pikminlegs_sprites()   'call this method from main to load sprites
	debug(`screen spritedef 0 8 8 `uhex_byte_array_(@pikminlegs_0, 64) `uhex_long_array_(@pikminlegs_0_colors, 11))
	debug(`screen spritedef 1 8 8 `uhex_byte_array_(@pikminlegs_1, 64) `uhex_long_array_(@pikminlegs_1_colors, 18))
	debug(`screen spritedef 2 8 8 `uhex_byte_array_(@pikminlegs_2, 64) `uhex_long_array_(@pikminlegs_2_colors, 17))
	debug(`screen spritedef 3 8 8 `uhex_byte_array_(@pikminlegs_3, 64) `uhex_long_array_(@pikminlegs_3_colors, 16))

dat pikminlegs_tiles byte {
}0,	{
}1,	{
}2,	{
}3

con 'pikminlegs sprites
dat pikminlegs_0 byte {
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$01,$01,$01,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$01,$02,$03,$04,$01,{
}$00,$00,$00,$01,$05,$06,$07,$01,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$08,$09,$0a,$01,{
}$01,$00,$01,$00,$01,$01,$01,$00,{
}$00,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00{
}
pikminlegs_0_colors long {
}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x0  -  0
}%11111111_11000100_10000000_00110111,{ 'index=0x1  -  1
}%10110001_10111010_11011111_11101011,{ 'index=0x2  -  2
}%11001100_10110101_11011101_11101011,{ 'index=0x3  -  3
}%10011110_10111000_11011111_11101010,{ 'index=0x4  -  4
}%11001100_10110111_11011110_11101011,{ 'index=0x5  -  5
}%10111001_10110101_11011101_11101001,{ 'index=0x6  -  6
}%11011110_11010011_11101010_11110010,{ 'index=0x7  -  7
}%11011010_11010110_11101100_11110011,{ 'index=0x8  -  8
}%11000000_10011110_11010010_11100100,{ 'index=0x9  -  9
}%11010001_11011110_11110000_11110110{ 'index=0xa  -  10
}

pikminlegs_1 byte {
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$01,$02,$03,$04,$05,$06,$00,{
}$00,$01,$07,$08,$09,$0a,$0b,$00,{
}$00,$00,$0c,$0d,$0e,$0f,$00,$00,{
}$00,$01,$10,$01,$01,$11,$01,$00,{
}$00,$01,$01,$00,$00,$01,$01,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00{
}
pikminlegs_1_colors long {
}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x0  -  0
}%11111111_00000000_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x1  -  1
}%11111111_00010000_00011000_01100000,{ 'index=0x2  -  2
}%11111111_00000000_00010011_10001100,{ 'index=0x3  -  3
}%11111111_00101100_01010001_11110000,{ 'index=0x4  -  4
}%11111111_00000101_00101000_10101111,{ 'index=0x5  -  5
}%11111111_00000001_00011010_01101011,{ 'index=0x6  -  6
}%11111111_01000001_01000111_10000100,{ 'index=0x7  -  7
}%11111111_00000000_00000010_01101110,{ 'index=0x8  -  8
}%11111111_00011111_01000000_11001011,{ 'index=0x9  -  9
}%11111111_00000000_00011001_10001101,{ 'index=0xa  -  10
}%11111111_00101010_00111111_01111110,{ 'index=0xb  -  11
}%11111111_00001000_00001101_00111110,{ 'index=0xc  -  12
}%11111111_00001011_00011100_01101100,{ 'index=0xd  -  13
}%11111111_01001011_01101001_11001011,{ 'index=0xe  -  14
}%11111111_00011101_00111001_10001100,{ 'index=0xf  -  15
}%11111111_00010001_00010001_00101010,{ 'index=0x10  -  16
}%11111111_00011001_00101100_01000100{ 'index=0x11  -  17
}

pikminlegs_2 byte {
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$01,$02,$03,$04,$05,$06,$00,{
}$00,$01,$07,$08,$09,$0a,$01,$00,{
}$00,$00,$0b,$0c,$0d,$0e,$00,$00,{
}$00,$01,$0f,$01,$10,$0c,$01,$00,{
}$00,$01,$01,$00,$00,$01,$01,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00{
}
pikminlegs_2_colors long {
}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x0  -  0
}%11111111_00000000_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x1  -  1
}%11111111_11111111_11101010_10100000,{ 'index=0x2  -  2
}%11111111_10001111_10000010_00011010,{ 'index=0x3  -  3
}%11111111_11111111_11111010_10000000,{ 'index=0x4  -  4
}%11111111_11100101_11011111_01111001,{ 'index=0x5  -  5
}%11111111_00101111_00100110_00010111,{ 'index=0x6  -  6
}%11111111_10011100_10001100_01001010,{ 'index=0x7  -  7
}%11111111_11111010_11110101_10000001,{ 'index=0x8  -  8
}%11111111_11011100_11011000_01101101,{ 'index=0x9  -  9
}%11111111_10110101_10110000_01011111,{ 'index=0xa  -  10
}%11111111_01000011_00110111_00000110,{ 'index=0xb  -  11
}%11111111_10111010_10111001_01001011,{ 'index=0xc  -  12
}%11111111_01110000_01101101_00011011,{ 'index=0xd  -  13
}%11111111_01010111_01010010_00011100,{ 'index=0xe  -  14
}%11111111_10010010_10001001_01110001,{ 'index=0xf  -  15
}%11111111_00011011_00010111_00000000{ 'index=0x10  -  16
}

pikminlegs_3 byte {
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$01,$02,$03,$04,$05,$06,$00,{
}$00,$01,$07,$08,$09,$0a,$01,$00,{
}$00,$00,$0b,$0c,$0d,$0e,$00,$00,{
}$00,$01,$0f,$01,$01,$0f,$01,$00,{
}$00,$01,$01,$00,$00,$01,$01,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00{
}
pikminlegs_3_colors long {
}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x0  -  0
}%11111111_00000000_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x1  -  1
}%11111111_01101100_00001110_00000111,{ 'index=0x2  -  2
}%11111111_10111001_00001001_00010100,{ 'index=0x3  -  3
}%11111111_11000010_00000010_00010000,{ 'index=0x4  -  4
}%11111111_10000010_00101000_00100011,{ 'index=0x5  -  5
}%11111111_00111000_00011010_00010001,{ 'index=0x6  -  6
}%11111111_01001111_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x7  -  7
}%11111111_10110011_00011011_00100101,{ 'index=0x8  -  8
}%11111111_10110100_00000111_00010110,{ 'index=0x9  -  9
}%11111111_01111001_00011000_00011011,{ 'index=0xa  -  10
}%11111111_01100110_00010011_00010101,{ 'index=0xb  -  11
}%11111111_10011010_00110000_00110011,{ 'index=0xc  -  12
}%11111111_10000000_00001010_00010000,{ 'index=0xd  -  13
}%11111111_01110100_00011001_00100001,{ 'index=0xe  -  14
}%11111111_01110010_00000000_00000000{ 'index=0xf  -  15
}
